prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey, I get it—putting off a tough task all morning can feel overwhelming, but you're already one step ahead by recognizing that. Remember, the hardest part is just starting, and once you do, you'll build momentum and feel that amazing sense of accomplishment. You've got the strength to tackle this—take a deep breath, dive in, and crush it! You've got this! 💪
